description: Custom Strategy Rules - ChatGPT evaluates entries against these rules alongside indicators

rules.name: Day 2 Breakout-Pullback (Chart-Based Revision)
rules.rule:
CONFIRMATIONS (in order):
1. Price must break above $0.78 (previous HOD / double top)
2. DO NOT buy the breakout candle
3. Wait for pullback after the break
4. Pullback must hold above $0.70 and form higher lows
5. Entry confirmation: reclaim/hold above EMAs (~$0.71-$0.72) with volume
6. Invalid if price loses $0.70 and fails to reclaim quickly

CURRENT STATE: Price around $0.73, consolidating under resistance.
RULE: Pullback entries only. No chasing.
rules.notes: Day-2 grinder. VWAP is far below (extended). Best entries come from a clean higher-low above $0.70 after a $0.78 break.

rules.name: Earnings Runner Day 2 (Chart-Based Revision)
rules.rule:
CONFIRMATIONS (in order):
1. Price must break above $0.91 first (local resistance)
2. Main trigger: break above $0.94 (previous high)
3. If it breaks, wait for pullback/retest
4. Retest must hold above $0.90
5. Entry confirmation: reclaim/hold above $0.90 with volume and EMAs holding
6. Invalid if price loses $0.88 and fails to reclaim

CURRENT STATE: Price around $0.89, holding above EMAs, with VWAP around $0.83.
RULE: No break = no trade. Do not buy random green candles under $0.90.
rules.notes: Tight flag under $0.90-$0.91. Best setup is breakout then retest hold over $0.90.

rules.name: High Volatility Setup (Chart-Based Revision)
rules.rule:
CONFIRMATIONS (in order):
1. Do not trade inside the $15.70-$16.20 chop zone
2. Trigger: reclaim $17.00 with strength and volume
3. After reclaim, wait for pullback
4. Pullback must hold above VWAP/EMAs (around $15.80-$15.90)
5. Entry confirmation: bounce off VWAP/EMAs after holding
6. Invalid if price loses VWAP and cannot reclaim

CURRENT STATE: Price around $15.90, sitting on VWAP, low volume, ranging.
RULE: Wait for direction. This is not in explosive mode right now.
rules.notes: This is currently a range-trap ticker. Only becomes tradable again on a strong reclaim of $17+.
